name: Kamo G
bio:
Kamo. G, also known as Kermmy, is a rising South African artist who was born in Pretoria but bred in Kempton Park. Kamo. G has been drawn to music since he was 9 years old, but it wasn't until he turned 16 that he decided to pursue a career as a recording artist.

Kamo. G's love for music began at an early age, as he grew up in a musical family where he was exposed to various genres of music. His passion for music led him to explore different sounds and styles, which he incorporates into his music today.

Although a natural talent, Kamo. G has always been his worst critic, delaying the release of his first musical offering. Nonetheless, more songs are on the way, culminating in the highly anticipated album "Oxygen Tank."

Kamo. G is here to bring a musical sound that relates to all circles of life. He aims to create music that resonates with people from all walks of life, regardless of their age, race, or gender. With his unique sound, Kamo. G hopes to inspire and uplift his listeners.

Kamo. G stands out from other artists with his genre-blending music, heartfelt lyrics, and smooth delivery.

Kamo. G's musical journey is just beginning, and he is determined to make a mark in the South African music industry. With his talent, dedication, and passion for music, there is no doubt that Kamo. G will go far in his career.
